commit.message:
Add automatic GitHub release creation to CI

When a push to main passes all checks, the release job reads VERSION from
config.py and creates a GitHub release (with auto-generated notes) if the
corresponding tag does not already exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

UI overhaul: collapsible sidebar, ICE integration, activity log, rounded design

  user avatar + name footer, 2-row theme/collapse controls

  credentials UI in Settings (ICE + Filebrowser fields)

  grouped timeline; wired into plasmid/feature/organism create/update/delete

- Reports page: Data Health panel, Plasmid List export, Formblatt Z table
- Backend-down detection and first-run profile nudge in App
- Rounded-full design system: Button component + all custom buttons/badges
- Search command palette, pagination, and kbd hints all rounded
- Fixed useTheme context bug (ThemeProvider/AppInner split)
- Filebrowser credential inputs in Settings > Integrations

commit.message:
Fix Godot 4.6 parse errors and script bugs

- Remove theme_override_* properties from .tscn files (causes parse errors in 4.6); apply via code in _ready() instead
- Add Cell preload to MineView/PlacementView to fix 'Cell not declared' errors
- Clear GridView.gd dead code (referenced removed BombEffect autoload)
- Fix BombPlacer.detonate() missing return value (was void, Main.gd awaits int)
- Fix UpgradeManager.get_chain_bonus_per_level() looking up key never set
- Fix AudioHooks accessing private AudioManager._current_bgm (redundant check)
- Replace recursive _auto_reveal with iterative BFS to prevent stack overflow

Fix canonical/redirect loop: disable Netlify trailing slashes

Netlify was 301-redirecting /about to /about/ but the page's
canonical pointed to /about (no slash), creating a loop for
Googlebot. Set pretty_urls = false to serve pages without
trailing slash redirects.

fix: Switch PayloadTypes and C2Profiles from polling to GraphQL subscriptions

Agents and C2 Profiles were not visible because Minerva used query+pollInterval
while Mythic's Hasura backend serves real-time data via WebSocket subscriptions.

- Add SUB_C2_PROFILES, SUB_PAYLOAD_TYPES, SUB_CONSUMING_CONTAINERS,
  SUB_TRANSLATION_CONTAINERS, SUB_CUSTOM_BROWSERS subscriptions to api.ts
- C2Profiles.tsx: useQuery → useSubscription, remove refetch/pollInterval
- PayloadTypes.tsx: useQuery → 4 separate useSubscription hooks for each
  data type (payloadtype, consumingcontainer, translationcontainer, custombrowser)
- Replace REFRESH buttons with LIVE indicator (data auto-updates via WebSocket)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix idle jumping: strip all idle transforms, timers, and gimmicks

Nuclear fix — removed every source of idle movement:
- All gimmick scheduling disabled (only runs in demo/preview mode)
- All external transforms removed except hop on hover
- Mouse tracking timer removed
- Drowsiness timer removed
- Idle eye tracking removed (static eyes)
- Only blink timer remains

Chawd is now completely frozen when idle. Only animates on hover.

fix: remove om.created_at from ORDER BY — column does not exist in org_members

The org_members table has no created_at column. All queries ordering by it
crashed with UndefinedColumnError, causing 500s on every authenticated route
including the LinkedIn OAuth connect flow.

commit.message:
Force static preset to prevent Netlify SSR override

Netlify auto-detects Nuxt and deploys with serverless functions
even when using nuxt generate. Explicitly set nitro preset to
'static' to ensure all pages are served as pre-rendered HTML.

${PORT:-8000} which Railway passes literally without shell
expansion. Removed so Dockerfile CMD (Python-based) is used.

commit.message:
fix: route JWT verification by algorithm — no HS256 fallback for ES256 tokens

ES256/RS256 tokens now ONLY use JWKS verification. The previous fallback to
HS256 for asymmetric tokens always failed silently, masking the real JWKS
error. Errors are now logged at ERROR level so Railway logs show the cause.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch from nuxt build (SSR) to nuxt generate (static)

nuxt build deploys as SSR with Netlify Functions — pages are
server-rendered on each request. nuxt generate pre-renders all
pages as static HTML at build time, served directly from CDN.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: read PORT via Python os.environ instead of shell expansion

Railway's Docker runtime doesn't expand shell variables in CMD.
Use Python to read PORT env var directly via uvicorn.run().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix Ahrefs skill URL encoding — use + for spaces, no Python

Agent was using inline Python heredoc for URL encoding which broke
with IndexError. Simplified: just use ${var// /+} bash substitution
or hardcode + in keyword strings. Added explicit warnings not to use
Python/urllib.

Merge branch 'feature/theme'

Full theme system implementation:
- ThemeManager with dark/light built-in themes and custom token overrides
- SettingsPanel Appearance tab: theme picker, per-token colour editor,
  save/load named custom themes to localStorage
- Price Bars tab: controls reflect and write back to the active theme
- All UI components replaced hardcoded hex values with var(--tchart-*)
  CSS custom properties throughout (ChartManager, SeriesManager,
  DrawingManager, DrawingRenderer, IndicatorEditor, LeftSidebar,
  BottomBar, DateRangePicker, WorkspacePanel, PriceScalePanel,
  Toolbar, SettingsPanel)

  propagated CSS vars via getComputedStyle at open time

Slides pages (/slides/multi-agent, /slides/slidev) and /the-game
are linked but don't have corresponding page routes, causing
prerender to fail. Set failOnError: false to skip broken links.

handler). If page still has focus after 1.5s (meaning iframe didn't
open calendar), falls back to Web Share API. Last resort: download.

commit.message:
theme: re-colour price bar series on theme change

SeriesManager now keeps series colours in sync with the active theme:

1. Store colorToken ('series-N') in ManagedSeries so it is available
   for theme-change recolouring without re-creating the series.

2. Subscribe to 'theme:changed' in the constructor and call the new
   _recolorAll(tokens) helper, which applies the correct colour options
   for every live series type (candlestick, ohlc-bar, line, area,
   histogram, baseline).

3. Fix stale fallback hex values that used GitHub-dark colours:
     '#388bfd' -> '#c6f135'  (series-1 / accent)
     '#3fb950' -> '#4ade80'  (color-up)
     '#f85149' -> '#f87171'  (color-down)
     '#8b949e' -> '#6b7280'  (color-neutral)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- sitemap.xml に /terms, /privacy を追加

commit.message:
fix: alineamiento documentación + font size + 5 security quick wins

Design:
- Alineamiento drop zone / textarea en sección Documentación (stretch grid)
- Tamaño fuente formulario aumentado (labels, inputs, step titles, drop zone)

Security quick wins:
1. SRI hashes en 3 scripts CDN (pdf.js, SheetJS, ExcelJS)
2. Eliminado unsafe-inline de script-src — pdfjsLib config movido a app.js
3. CORS fallback hardcodeado a raona-uat.pages.dev (no wildcard)
4. CSP hardened: object-src none, base-uri none, form-action self, frame-ancestors none
5. Headers: Referrer-Policy + Permissions-Policy añadidos

feat: dynamic AlphaLeaderBadge matches sort context, Grade B includes SPY 1D comparison

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

theme: Price Bars controls show theme colour first, user opts as fallback

Flip operand order throughout _buildPriceBarsTab so the active theme
token is always shown as the initial value in every colour picker, with
the series option (opts.*) kept only as a safety fallback when the
theme provides no value for that token.

- _buildBullBearTable: upDefault ?? opts[upKey], downDefault ?? opts[downKey]
- _appendLineControls / _appendHistogramControls: s1 ?? opts.color
- _appendAreaControls: s1 ?? opts.lineColor; s1+'4d' / s1+'00' for fills
  (string concatenation is never nullish so ?? was dropped for these)
- _appendBaselineControls: up ?? opts.topLineColor, up+'26' for fill;
  down ?? opts.bottomLineColor, down+'26' for fill

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v4.10.4: Use blob URL with location.href for calendar app trigger

Data URI approach was blocked by browser. Switch to blob URL with
window.location.href which should trigger Android's intent handler
for .ics files and open the calendar app picker directly.

commit.message:
Enable prerendering for all routes

Switch from SSR-on-demand to build-time prerendering with
crawlLinks: true. Nuxt will crawl from seed routes and discover
all blog posts, project pages, and locale variants automatically.
Faster page loads, no server-side rendering cost per request.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

v4.10.2: Replace Google Calendar URL with .ics file for universal calendar support

Calendar button now generates a downloadable .ics file instead of
opening a Google Calendar URL. Android/iOS will offer to open it in
Samsung Calendar, Google Calendar, or any installed calendar app.

repository.name: rian
repository.description: Time Sheet

commit.message:
theme: Price Bars controls read fallback colours from theme tokens

Replace all hardcoded fallback hex values in the Price Bars tab with
live reads from this._themeManager.getTokens() so the displayed
defaults always match the loaded theme:

- Candlestick / OHLC Bar: upDefault / downDefault now use
  tokens['color-up'] and tokens['color-down'] instead of #4ade80 / #f87171.
- Line / Area / Histogram: fallback colour now uses tokens['series-1']
  instead of the incorrect #388bfd (GitHub blue).
- Area fill alphas: derived from series-1 with appended 4d / 00 alpha
  hex so they stay in the same colour family as the active theme.
- Baseline above/below: line and fill colours derived from
  tokens['color-up'] / tokens['color-down'] with 26 alpha for fills.

The actual series options (opts.*) are still preferred when set; tokens
only drive the fallback shown when no explicit value exists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove legacy /about -> / redirect

/about is now a real page with content, SEO meta, and structured
data. The old redirect was causing a 301 to homepage, breaking
canonical URLs and hreflang for the about page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Telegram notification HTML — restrict to supported tags only

Telegram rejects unsupported HTML tags like <ul>, <table>, <div> etc.
Added explicit tag whitelist and a concrete message template using only
<b>, <i>, <a> with bullet characters for lists.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
theme: propagate CSS vars to document.body drawers and fix hardcoded colours

LeftSidebar - add _propagateTheme helper that resolves all tchart CSS
custom properties from the shadow-DOM sidebar element and writes them
onto any document.body-attached element so var references resolve.
Call it before opening each flyout drawer (fib, lines, visibility)
and before showing the tooltip. Update tooltip hardcoded colours to
CSS vars. Fix hardcoded #191919 in _applyActiveStyle.

SettingsPanel - replace three remaining hardcoded #191919 literals
in tab activate handler, _actionBtn hover, and _styleThemeBtn
with var(--tchart-bg-primary, #191919).

fix: oauth_linkedin — use _decode_jwt (ES256/JWKS) instead of hardcoded HS256

LinkedIn connect route was verifying the JWT with HS256 only, causing
invalid_token error for new Supabase ES256-signed tokens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v4.10.1: Fix removeNoteReminder to delete ALL reminders for a note

The note had 41 duplicate fired reminders accumulated. The old code
only removed one at a time via findIndex, so the reminder kept
reappearing after each removal. Now filters out all reminders
matching the noteId in a single operation.

commit.message:
Fix hreflang/canonical: manual generation instead of useLocaleHead

useLocaleHead wasn't resolving route-specific URLs during SSR,
causing all pages to get the homepage's canonical/hreflang.
Replaced with manual link generation based on route.path that
correctly strips locale prefixes and builds per-locale alternates.
